name: TYPO3 Documentation Team page
purpose: Official page of the TYPO3 Documentation Team: members, mission and how to join.

name: docs.typo3.org
purpose: Rendered, published TYPO3 documentation. The reader-facing output of these repositories.

name: TYPO3 Slack #typo3-documentation
purpose: Main public coordination channel for documentation questions and onboarding. Join TYPO3 Slack, then open #typo3-documentation.

name: talk.typo3.org
purpose: Community discussion forum for longer-form questions and announcements.

name: GitHub Issues
purpose: Repository-specific bugs, content changes, broken examples and implementation discussions.

name: GitHub Pull Requests
purpose: Concrete documentation changes, review discussions and merge readiness.
